description: A guest requests assistance from the concierge to book a dinner reservation at a popular local restaurant.

nodes.task_description: Inquire about the guest's preferred cuisine, time, and party size.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary details for the reservation request.

nodes.task_description: Contact the requested restaurant to check for availability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully contacts the restaurant and finds an available table.

nodes.task_description: Book the reservation under the guest's name and confirm the details back to the guest.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes the booking and clearly communicates the confirmation details to the guest.
